case_title: JASON WONG LIMA VS. SILVER SOMA LLC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG LIMA, JASON AS TO DEFENDANT SILVER SOMA LLC. DBA - EXPRESS RENT A CAR SAN DIEGO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WONG LIMA, JASON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SILVER SOMA LLC. DBA - EXPRESS RENT A CAR SAN DIEGO $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,090.00, AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT, ALEXANDRA ROQUET, IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE, NO PROOF OF SERVICE. THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT WONG LIMA, JASON RECOVER FROM APPELLANT SILVER SOMA LLC. DBA - EXPRESS RENT A CAR SAN DIEGO $2,345.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,495.00, PRINCIPAL AMOUNT IS VALUE OF CAR, LESS SALES PRICE, PLUS OUT OF POCKET EXPENSES. calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-04-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Thursday, June 4, 2015 in Department 525:
Jason Wong Lima, Respondent/Plaintiff appears as Propria Persona with witness Bessy Wong.
Silver Soma Llc, Appellant/Defendant appears by Jordan Clark.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witness are sworn. Jason Wong Lima testifies on his own behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit (A) - copy of insurance, registration, Industrial Auto Body - list of damages, eleven pages Bess e-mail dated 9/24/2014, CAD printout, Towing and storage invoices.

Jordan Clark testifies on his own behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit 1 - Express rental agreement, Express accident report, e-mail from Christina, etc.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. Newly evidence retained by the Court.

Judge Elliott Myles; Clerk J. Kong; matter not reported.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-13-2015 Continued To Jun-04-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Wednesday, May 13, 2015 in Department 525:
Jason Wong Lima, Respondent/Plaintiff appears as propria Persona with witness Bessy Wong.
Silver Soma Llc, Appellant/Defendant no appearances by anyone.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Clerk informed the Court that Jordan Clark, manager of Silver Soma Llc. called this morning informing that he has missed his flight and cannot make the hearig.

For a good cause, Court orders the matter to continues to June 4, 2015 and for appellant to show proof in the next hearing. Court adjourned.

Judge David Yang; Clerk J. Kong; matter not reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Mar-26-2015 Judgment Entered
